name: Title: Rhubarb Bars
recipeInstructions:
1. In a saucepan, mix the filling ingredients and cook until thick. Set aside.
2. Mix the crust ingredients together until crumbly.
3. Divide the crust crumbs into thirds. Press 2/3 of the crust mixture into a 9x13 pan.
4. Pour the rhubarb mixture on top.
5. Sprinkle with the remaining 1/3 of the crumb mixture.
6. Bake at 350 degrees (F) for 30 - 35 minutes.
Contributor: Lena
